# An Enquiry Concerning Human Understanding

*[David Hume](../philosophers/hume.md) · 1748*

The more accessible recasting of the Treatise's theses, which became the classic of Hume's sceptical empiricism. He there develops the problem of induction, his analysis of causation, and his famous maxim that the wise man proportions his belief to the evidence.
